name: Kingsmen Resources Ltd.
description: Kingsmen Resources Ltd. is a Mexico-focused exploration company based in Vancouver, British Columbia. The company is dedicated to the consolidation and development of two brownfield, district-scale silver and gold systems located in the historic mining district of Parral, Chihuahua, Mexico. Kingsmen Resources aims to bring new life to these projects by exploring high-grade underground vein, carbonate replacement deposit (CRD), and skarn potential. Listed on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker KNG, the company leverages its strategic position in a mining-friendly jurisdiction to drive value through systematic exploration and resource development.
